sentences.arabic: تَعَطَّلَتِ الْكَهْرَبَاءُ فِي بَعْضِ أَحْيَاءِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Struja se ugasila u nekim kvartovima grada.
sentences.translationEn: The electricity went out in some neighborhoods of the city.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ الْفَنِّيُّونَ طُولَ اللَّيْلِ لِإِصْلَاحِ الْعَطَلِ.
sentences.translation: Tehničari su radili cijelu noć da poprave kvar.
sentences.translationEn: The technicians worked all night to fix the fault.

sentences.arabic: عَادَتِ الْكَهْرَبَاءُ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ إِلَى كُلِّ الْمَنَازِلِ.
sentences.translation: Struja se jutros vratila u sva domaćinstva.
sentences.translationEn: The electricity returned this morning to all homes.

sentences.arabic: اعْتَذَرَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ عَنِ الإِزْعَاجِ وَشَكَرَتِ النَّاسَ لِصَبْرِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Kompanija se izvinjava zbog smetnji i zahvaljuje se ljudima na strpljenju.
sentences.translationEn: The company apologized for the inconvenience and thanked people for their patience.
